case_title: ANTHONY WILSON BELMONTE VS. NEAL GRAHAM et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT CCP 1169 & LOST ORIGINAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, NEAL DOES 1 TO 20,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS,COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON SERVED DEC-24-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, NEAL
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON ON DEFENDANT GRAHAM, NEAL
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, NEAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAHAM, NEAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY ST. #545, S.F. CA. 94107, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
